<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
    <key>PayloadContent</key>
    <array>
        <dict>
            <key>NotificationSettings</key>
            <array>
                <dict>
                    <key>AlertType</key>
                    <integer>0</integer>
                    <key>BundleIdentifier</key>
                    <string>com.apple.mobilemail</string>
                    <key>NotificationsEnabled</key>
                    <false/>
                </dict>
            </array>
            <key>ShowInLockScreen</key>
            <true/>
            <key>PayloadIdentifier</key>
            <string>com.example.mynotificationspayload</string>
            <key>PayloadType</key>
            <string>com.apple.notificationsettings</string>
            <key>PayloadUUID</key>
            <string>d1cc23d9-f482-40c5-b7b1-332149659986</string>
            <key>PayloadVersion</key>
            <real>1</real>
        </dict>
    </array>
    <key>PayloadDisplayName</key>
    <string>Notification</string>
    <key>PayloadIdentifier</key>
    <string>com.example.myprofile</string>
    <key>PayloadType</key>
    <string>Configuration</string>
    <key>PayloadUUID</key>
    <string>2bb0ab2e-1e0a-4c03-a662-b4ee2ffe224a</string>
    <key>PayloadVersion</key>
    <integer>1</integer>
</dict>
</plist>

---

crawled: 2026-03-10T15:24:01Z

# Notifications

**Device Management Profile**

The payload that configures notifications.

## Declaration

```swift
object Notifications
```

## Discussion

Specify `com.apple.notificationsettings` as the payload type.

### Profile availability



### Profile example

```plist
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
    <key>PayloadContent</key>
    <array>
        <dict>
            <key>NotificationSettings</key>
            <array>
                <dict>
                    <key>AlertType</key>
                    <integer>0</integer>
                    <key>BundleIdentifier</key>
                    <string>com.apple.mobilemail</string>
                    <key>NotificationsEnabled</key>
                    <false/>
                </dict>
            </array>
            <key>ShowInLockScreen</key>
            <true/>
            <key>PayloadIdentifier</key>
            <string>com.example.mynotificationspayload</string>
            <key>PayloadType</key>
            <string>com.apple.notificationsettings</string>
            <key>PayloadUUID</key>
            <string>d1cc23d9-f482-40c5-b7b1-332149659986</string>
            <key>PayloadVersion</key>
            <real>1</real>
        </dict>
    </array>
    <key>PayloadDisplayName</key>
    <string>Notification</string>
    <key>PayloadIdentifier</key>
    <string>com.example.myprofile</string>
    <key>PayloadType</key>
    <string>Configuration</string>
    <key>PayloadUUID</key>
    <string>2bb0ab2e-1e0a-4c03-a662-b4ee2ffe224a</string>
    <key>PayloadVersion</key>
    <integer>1</integer>
</dict>
</plist>
```

## Objects

- **Notifications.NotificationSettingsItem**: The notification settings dictionary.

## User Experience

- **Accessibility**: The payload that configures the accessibility features of the device.
- **Desktop**: The payload that configures the desktop wallpaper.
- **Dock**: The payload that configures the Dock.
- **Finder**: The payload that configures Finder settings.
- **HomeScreenLayout**: The payload that configures the Home Screen layout.
- **ManagedMenuExtras**: The payload that configures menu extras.
- **ScreensaverUser**: The payload that configures a user’s screen saver settings.
- **SetupAssistant**: The payload that configures Setup Assistant settings.
- **TimeMachine**: The payload that configures Time Machine.
